payload.recommendation: Treat as authority-inversion CAPA inventory; avoid adding more artifact-first fixes where state-machine pullbacks already exist.
payload.summary: Current Narada buildout still has artifact-first surfaces that should invert to authority/lifecycle/evidence/locus structures: raw test commands, task close/review commands, operator-surface send, law text edits, inbox work-next output, next chat ritual, CLI shim freshness, and roster status.
payload.title: Authority-Revealing Inversion misses in current Narada surfaces
